column4: Laptop won't turn on after update
column5: Provide steps to troubleshoot laptop and escalate to IT support.
Verify request with supervisor and grant access to the Azure portal.

column4: Printer jammed and smoking on the 3rd floor

Initiate password recovery process and assist user.
